name: CH32V205RCT6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32V205 parser pipeline for CH32V205RCT6 LQFP64. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-1-1 CH32V205 pin definitions. CH32V205RCT6 is a CH32V205 MCU in a 64-pin LQFP64 package. This generated definition includes 29 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 16 input channels, CAN, 2 I2C buses, 2 op-amps, USB full-speed, 2 SPI buses, and 8 serial ports.
